The '''''Corvus''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor Cruiser]] that was involved with the [[Battle of To-phalion Base]]. The cruiser arrived late to the battle. The traitors, led by renegade [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], escaped [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] because they went into hyperspace before their [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]] could be disabled. However, the ''Corvus'' did not fail its mission. It accompanied Thrawn and his personal flagship, the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Grey Wolf]]'', on their mission to destroy Zaarin after pursuing him to deep space. Zaarin was holed up inside his flagship, the Star Destroyer [[Glory (Imperial-class)|''Glory'']], and the ''Corvus'' disabled its hyperdrives so that Thrawn's forces could eliminate the traitor forces. Thrawn's forces, led by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], fought off waves of Zaarin's elite [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]] in order to protect the ''Corvus'', but the ship suffered severe damage despite Thrawn's efforts. Fortunately, Stele and his wingmen succeeded in destroying the ''Glory'' and killing Admiral Zaarin before the ''Corvus'' could be destroyed.
